title: Geum flavum
intro: Geum flavum, also known as the yellow avens or small avens, is a flowering plant species within the family Rosaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in wound healing, reducing the risk of infections, and protecting against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Geum flavum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Geum flavum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and digestive issues.
taxonomy: Geum flavum is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The classification of Geum flavum includes its genus, Geum, which belongs to the tribe Colurieae. This tribe is a part of the subfamily Rosoideae, which is one of the major subfamilies within the family Rosaceae. The classification of Geum flavum also places it within the kingdom Plantae.
uses: Geum flavum, also known as the yellow avens, has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers are used to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Some studies suggest that Geum flavum may help to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and nausea. Additionally, the plant is thought to have antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of minor wounds and skin irritations. However, more research is needed to fully understand the medicinal uses and potential risks associated with Geum flavum.

preparations: Geum flavum is a plant that has been used in traditional herbal medicine, particularly in European folk remedies. Herbal preparations made from Geum flavum are said to have anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
